title: Tip of the week #13: Events management

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
One source of truth for your entire event plan

monday.com allows event planners to manage the entire event lifecycle within one platform. Create tasks, track feedback, collaborate on creative assets, manage vendors and approvals, and store event documents—all in one place.

The monday.com mobile app enables event managers to have immediate access to the event plan and operational details while onsite at an event.

image2000×872 112 KB

You can also use forms to manage registrations and gather post-event feedback, status columns for attendance tracking, and Gantt views for deadline management. monday.com also integrates seamlessly with tools like Eventbrite, Mailchimp, and HubSpot, ensuring smooth event coordination from start to finish.
